title: Dynasty [16x] - Saphire
description: A blue recolor of my royalty themed resource pack : Dynasty [16x] !
body:
Dynasty is a golden/royalty pack made for 1.8.9 pvp, mostly bedwars but can also be used in other gamemodes :)

it was kinda made as a tribute to technoblade but i didn't thought i'd release it this late.

here are some ingame screenshots of the pack :)

![Dynasty blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f253fd0adad7331150b1c47f36548605348b6fb.jpeg)

![Dynasty blue prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58e57fbd3da1f5696a9e9e24d4eb31bb75659ba9.jpeg)

![Dynasty blue prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae064821d3f92bade241d987dca027adb2689988.jpeg)

It also has 6 recolors :

- The Original pack : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty)

![Dynasty Prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a235c8c0ba0f77dffce760302c90297ac35dadb6.jpeg)

- The Jade recolor, a green recolor of the pack : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-jade)

![Dynasty green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31d49d41827818e36601f51ca091d5215643c86e_0.webp)

- The Blackstone recolor, a black recolor of the pack : [https://modrinth.com/project/dynasty-blackstone](https://modrinth.com/project/dynasty-blackstone)

![Dynasty black](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad7813dd7eae1089bb992d36c459b6f7db6accdf.jpeg)

- The Diamond recolor, a cyan recolor of the pack : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-diamond](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-diamond)

![Dynasty cyan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b89da272699cc7d84037da4babf099cf77560f1.jpeg)

- The Amethyst recolor, a purple recolor of the pack : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-amethyst](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-amethyst)

![Dynasty purple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2dae60d72a07b5334dbbbfee4185649f114b999.jpeg)

- The Topaz recolor, a yellow recolor of the pack : [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-topaz](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dynasty-topaz)

![Dynasty yellow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccdadd48e2c8f9f608076bc5be29002834f20fd7.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
